name: Reflex Plus Dog Alutray Mini Small Breed Beef InGravy 85g
shortDescription: Alu-tray is a nutritious wet food with high-quality animal protein and a variety of vitamins. It offers multisystemic benefits due to its functional components. With its high water content, it supports the body's daily water intake and contributes to kidney health. Additionally, it is easy to digest and highly palatable.
description: Alu-tray is a nutritious wet food with high-quality animal protein and a variety of vitamins. It offers multisystemic benefits due to its functional components. With its high water content, it supports the body's daily water intake and contributes to kidney health. Additionally, it is easy to digest and highly palatable. Ingredients: Meat and animal derivatives (4% Beef), Minerals, Derivatives of vegetable origin. Nutrient Components Crude protein 8.5% Fat content 4% Crude fibre 0.4% Crude ash 2% Moisture 85.5% Nutritional Supplements Vitamins: Vitamin D3 (3a671) 75 IU, Vitamin E (3a700) 30 mg, Biotin (3a880) 100 ug. Trace Elements: 3b605 (Zinc 15 mg), 3b503 (Manganese 6 mg), 3b405 (Copper 1 mg), 3b202 (Iodine 0.3 mg).
